misc: Making a comeback after a few years' hiatus from Hector Trophée events by returning to Konopiště and competing in Hector Trophée 2026.
Did participate in the 2025 Matchplay series.
biography: Kristian, representing Master Golf Club, is set to make a highly anticipated return to the Hector Trophée greens at its 2026 edition. This year marks his fourth appearance in the esteemed pair competition, a comeback that is particularly noteworthy as it signals his presence once again at Konopiště, a venue remembered by many past competitors.

After a hiatus from the Hector Trophée itself, Kristian maintained his competitive edge by actively participating in the 2025 Matchplay series, demonstrating his sustained passion for Hector events. His prior three participations in the main Trophée have showcased a determined competitor, consistently navigating the challenges of the course with earnest effort.

While Kristian has yet to secure either the coveted Hector Trophée for his pairing or the prestigious individual Victor Trophy, his return embodies the spirit of an athlete unyielding in the face of formidable competition. The golfing community looks forward to witnessing if this seasoned player's renewed focus will translate into a breakthrough performance on this celebrated stage.
